headline: SCORE SUPPLIERS, DIRECT SCRUTINY
subheading: A senior QP's practical, inspection-ready method for ranking suppliers and focusing your limited audit days.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial pharmaceutical composition visualising risk-based supplier assessment, set against a deep navy background. The focal element is a clean three-by-three risk matrix rendered as luminous floating glass cells, graduating from cool teal through cyan into a brighter fresh-green band in the safe corner, suggesting low, medium and high risk tiers. Slender interconnecting lines and nodes fan outward like a controlled supply chain or decision tree, each node a softly glowing orb, some highlighted to imply prioritised scrutiny. In the soft-focus background, faint rows of translucent vials and brushed-steel shelving recede into shallow navy bokeh, evoking a meticulous quality environment. A magnifier-like circular lens of light hovers over one matrix cell, conveying focused inspection and proportionate oversight. The mood is calm, precise, premium and clinical-luxury, with crisp reflective surfaces and subtle depth. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
